about.bio.1: My curiosity spans every dimension of my work and life. From studying behavioral patterns in creative communities to designing physical spaces that meet human-centered standards, my mind is constantly solving layered problems. A gap in my knowledge is simply an invitation to go deeper — and that drive has shaped every product I've touched.
about.bio.2: Ultimately, it's my ability to translate complex user needs into elegant, measurable interaction design experiences — and to communicate that process with clarity to anyone in the room — that people tell me sets me apart.
about.quote.text: Great interaction design starts with deep empathy for the user and ends with measurable impact on the product.
about.title: A designer who thinks in systems and speaks in outcomes
about.value.0.desc: Every user-centered design decision starts with a genuine curiosity about the problem — not a rush to the solution.
about.value.0.title: Curiosity-led
about.value.1.desc: The smallest missed detail in an interaction flow creates the biggest drop-off. I suffer the details so users never have to.
about.value.1.title: Detail-obsessed
about.value.2.desc: Clear communication of design rationale — to engineers, product managers, hardware teams, and executives — is what moves great ideas into great products.
about.value.2.title: Communicator at heart
about.value.3.desc: Every design decision I make is anchored to a measurable outcome: task completion, subscriber retention, or platform engagement growth.
about.value.3.title: Outcome-driven

modal.project.0.challenge: Within four months of adoption, insights generated by the platform directly informed targeted engagement strategies that reversed a negative profit trajectory. The business moved from a –17% margin to a +2% margin, improved subscriber retention and renewals, increased average cart size, and reduced onboarding friction — demonstrating how thoughtfully applied AI, grounded in user-centered research and interaction design principles, drives measurable platform outcomes.

modal.project.0.outcome.0: Reversed negative profitability — from a –17% operating margin to +2% within four months through data-driven interaction design.
modal.project.0.outcome.1: 15% improvement in subscriber retention and renewals from real, actionable behavioral and qualitative user insights.
modal.project.0.outcome.2: 10% increase in average cart size and user lifetime value through improved platform engagement design.
modal.project.0.outcome.3: Reduced onboarding friction — enabling new users to activate faster by proactively addressing interaction barriers.
modal.project.0.outcome.4: Scaled user understanding across ~40 stakeholders in sales, member care, product development, and executive leadership.
modal.project.0.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.0.overview: An AI-assisted persona platform built on live business intelligence data — combining behavioral, demographic, and psychological insights to help cross-functional teams understand not just who users are, but how and why they make decisions. Designed and delivered end-to-end as a user-centered product initiative.

Within four months, it enabled more precise targeting and smarter interactions that helped move our operating margin from –17% to +2%, while strengthening user trust and long-term platform engagement.

modal.project.1.challenge: Architected and led delivery of a comprehensive design system to modernize a fragmented web and platform experience spanning marketing, sales, consumer-facing software, and internal tools. The goal was not only visual consistency, but a durable design language system improving scalability and execution speed — aligning interaction design decisions with business outcomes and user needs.
modal.project.1.kpi.0.label: Reduction in Delivery Time
modal.project.1.kpi.1.label: Designers Impacted
modal.project.1.kpi.2.label: More Design Deliverables
modal.project.1.kpi.3.label: Designer Hours Saved
modal.project.1.outcome.0: Consistent interaction design patterns across products — eliminating inconsistencies between designers and platforms.
modal.project.1.outcome.1: A shared design language source of truth clarifying scope, deliverables, and expectations for all design artifacts.
modal.project.1.outcome.2: Alignment between UX strategy and business goals by embedding design intent directly into system standards.
modal.project.1.outcome.3: Increased confidence and autonomy of junior and mid-level designers through clear, repeatable interaction patterns.
modal.project.1.outcome.4: Gained executive trust by providing visible, consistent design language standards referenced across deliverables org-wide.
modal.project.1.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.1.overview: Delivered as a hybrid greenfield and progressive migration, the system lives in Figma and is referenced directly in the CMS — enabling designers, engineers, and leaders to operate from a shared source of truth. Adoption improved delivery speed, interaction design quality, and team confidence — transforming design from a reactive service into a scalable, strategic platform capability.

modal.project.1.quote.text: This system changed how we work. Delivery time was cut by roughly 50%. Interaction design quality jumped by about 80%. We went from weeks assembling concepts to delivering clean, standardized prototypes in days. It raised the bar for every project.

modal.project.1.title: Design System Architect
modal.project.2.challenge: Defined the experience strategy and interaction design for new user onboarding flows and platform advancement journeys. The core challenge is twofold: making it genuinely easy for new and existing users to activate in compliance with platform requirements, and ensuring prospective users clearly understand the value of the product and platform — without confusion, friction, or mistrust.
modal.project.2.kpi.0.label: Target NPS Increase
modal.project.2.kpi.1.label: Touchpoints Redesigned
modal.project.2.kpi.2.label: Projected Churn ↓
modal.project.2.kpi.3.label: Target Completion
modal.project.2.outcome.0: Clarified platform value proposition — reducing hesitation and confusion at tier selection through user-centered interaction design.
modal.project.2.outcome.1: Improved trust and transparency in cart and checkout through clearer interaction states and guided success flows.
modal.project.2.outcome.2: Enabled subscription-led platform activation as a first-class user experience rather than an optional afterthought.
modal.project.2.outcome.3: Reduced friction for users advancing toward deeper platform participation and community engagement.
modal.project.2.outcome.4: Established a scalable onboarding and advancement framework aligned with long-term subscriber retention and platform growth.
modal.project.2.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.2.overview: This initiative reframes onboarding as a guided progression rather than a transactional gate — aligning interaction design, platform mechanics, and subscription flows across landing pages, cart, and checkout. The experience encourages first-time visitors to activate with a product subscription and confidently advance on the platform. The result is a scalable foundation that improves conversion, reduces abandonment at critical moments, and supports sustainable platform growth.

modal.project.2.quote.text: By simplifying the onboarding journey and aligning it with subscription-based platform engagement, we plan to reduce effort at the most fragile points of conversion. Early analysis shows faster completion times, higher subscription attachment at activation, and improved user confidence.

modal.project.2.title: Platform Onboarding Experience
modal.project.4.challenge: Leading the end-to-end interaction design refactoring of cart and checkout for a high-growth consumer platform facing critical revenue leakage from extreme abandonment exceeding 80%. Declining user trust and checkout flows diverging significantly from modern software interaction standards positioned this as a business recovery initiative — not a visual refresh.

modal.project.4.outcome.0: Clear, confidence-driven cart interaction experience addressing user uncertainty at the point of purchase.
modal.project.4.outcome.1: Reduced user effort in checkout flows by eliminating unnecessary interaction steps and ambiguity.
modal.project.4.outcome.2: Enabled subscriptions as a first-class interaction directly within the cart experience.
modal.project.4.outcome.3: Parity with modern consumer software UX standards — closing the interaction design gap with top-performing platforms.
modal.project.4.outcome.4: Measurable growth in platform revenue, user retention, and trust through isolated, testable interaction improvements.
modal.project.4.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.4.overview: Restoring user trust, reducing cognitive load, and enabling revenue-positive behaviors directly within the cart experience — including subscriptions, upsell, and frictionless express checkout. Partnering with executive leadership, product management, and engineering to establish an interaction design-led roadmap that aligns UX decisions with platform business outcomes.

modal.project.5.challenge: Leading the experience strategy and interaction design for a new sitewide intelligent search component to address a critical trust and relevance failure. Legacy search returned inaccurate results, forcing users to rely on external search engines to find products — directly undermining platform conversion and user confidence.
modal.project.5.kpi.0.label: Smart Search Results
modal.project.5.kpi.1.label: Accuracy in SERP
modal.project.5.kpi.2.label: Revenue & Growth
modal.project.5.kpi.3.label: Official Kickoff Date
modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore user trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results through user-centered interaction design.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to platform conversion through intelligent product recommendations and AI-assisted discovery logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and platform resources into a single, coherent interaction experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic platform tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, engagement, and user retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer interaction layer — not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI layer, the new system delivers exact, high-confidence results, guides users when intent is unclear, and surfaces recommendations that accelerate platform conversion, subscription, and retention actions.
